pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support for newer bytecode versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the release flag, the compiler might not strictly enforce cross-compilation compatibility with Java 21, potentially allowing usage of APIs not available in the target runtime or failing to strip out internal APIs.
